summary: Backend testing of Push Notification APIs for Mechanic App. All 6 features tested successfully: Push Token Registration, Push Token Unregistration, Get Notifications, Mark Notification Read, Notification on Inspection Assignment, and Push Token Database Storage.
critical_code_review_comments: FCM is running in mock mode without production Firebase credentials - notifications are logged but not actually sent to devices
Push token storage uses upsert pattern correctly - prevents duplicate tokens per mechanic
Notification records are properly stored in mechanic_notifications collection with all required fields
context_for_next_testing_agent: Push notification APIs fully tested. All endpoints working: POST /api/mechanic/push-token (register), DELETE /api/mechanic/push-token (unregister), GET /api/mechanic/notifications, PATCH /api/mechanic/notifications/{id}/read. Notifications are created when: 1) New inspection is created in mechanic's city (via notify_mechanics_in_city), 2) Inspection is assigned to mechanic (via send_mechanic_notification). FCM runs in MOCK MODE without production Firebase credentials. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_push_notifications.py can be reused for regression testing.

features_tested.POST /api/mechanic/push-token: PASS - Registers device token with platform and device_info, upserts on same mechanic
features_tested.DELETE /api/mechanic/push-token: PASS - Removes push token on logout, unsubscribes from city topics
features_tested.GET /api/mechanic/notifications: PASS - Returns notification history with limit parameter support
features_tested.PATCH /api/mechanic/notifications/{id}/r: PASS - Marks notification as read with timestamp
features_tested.Notification on Inspection Assignment: PASS - Creates notification record when mechanic is assigned via /api/inspections/{id}/assign-mechanic
features_tested.Push Token Database Storage: PASS - Verified tokens stored in mechanic_push_tokens collection with mechanic_id, device_token, platform, device_info, timestamps

database_verification.mechanic_push_tokens_collection: Verified - Contains mechanic_id, device_token, platform, device_info, created_at, updated_at
database_verification.mechanic_notifications_collection: Verified - Contains id, mechanic_id, title, body, data, type, read, created_at

fcm_status.mode: MOCK MODE - notifications logged but not sent to devices

notification_templates_verified: new_inspection_available - Triggered when new inspection created in city
inspection_assigned - Triggered when mechanic assigned to inspection
